task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL application window is visible with a 3D molecular structure loaded. The object panel or command line should indicate '7RSA'.

task_completion.description: Calculate omega dihedral angles for prolines
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer shows dashed measurement lines with angle values, or the PyMOL console shows commands/output for calculating dihedral angles (e.g., 'get_dihedral') for the peptide bonds preceding prolines.

task_completion.description: Set up visualization of residues 92 and 93 in stick representation
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PyMOL viewer, residues 92 and 93 are displayed in 'stick' representation. The camera is zoomed in and centered on the peptide bond connecting these two residues.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization as a PNG figure
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL console shows a command saving the image to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/cis_pro93.png', or a file explorer/terminal confirms the file was created at this exact path.

task_completion.description: Create a text report with cis-prolines and their angles
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/cis_proline_report.txt'. The file must contain ONLY the sequence numbers 93 and 114, along with their angles (around 3.13 and 0.70). It must NOT contain residues 42 or 117.

integrity.description: Agent used PyMOL to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent actually opened PyMOL, loaded the structure, and used its measurement tools or commands, rather than writing an external script to bypass PyMOL.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste answers from prior knowledge
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent measured the angles in the software and used those measured values in the report, rather than instantly creating the report with exact known values without measuring.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely set up the visualization before saving
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the PyMOL viewer actually reflects the requested stick representation and zoom level before the 'png' command is executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The structure 7RSA contains four prolines. Pro93 and Pro114 are cis-prolines with omega angles of ~3.13° and ~0.70°. Pro42 and Pro117 are trans-prolines with angles of ~-173.96° and ~178.23°. The final report must ONLY list 93 and 114. The image must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/cis_pro93.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/cis_proline_report.txt.
